title: swift-linter configuration (v1)
description: Per-package linter configuration consumed by the swift-linter engine. Place at the package root next to Package.swift as `.swift-linter.json`. The engine reads this file once per package per lint run, caches the result, and threads `brandTypes` onto every parsed source in that package so recognizer-class rules (PATTERN-017 / CONV-016 / IMPL-010) can admit same-package access without firing. Cross-package consumers still fire (strict-superset preserved). See `Research/numerics-rule-recognizer-2026-05-12.md` for the rationale. Note: editor `$schema` completion via this URL is best-effort — the schema file lives in the linter-rules repo and may not be reachable from all editors. Direct path references (e.g., `file://...`) work locally but are not portable; the canonical contract is the schema file's content, not its URL.

$schema.description: Schema-reference URL or path. Permitted but ignored by the engine; consumed by editors for completion / validation.

brandTypes.description: Names of brand-newtype declarations contributed by this SwiftPM package. Names match the access target's identifier as authored in source — bare for top-level types (`Ordinal`, `Cardinal`), dotted for nested types (`Affine.Discrete.Vector`). The engine compares each `.rawValue` access target against this set; recognizer-class rules admit (do not fire) when the target is in the set AND the file lives in this package. Cross-package access still fires.
